title: Balloonies
description: Ever wonder how flying Lucky Block would be?
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdcc4d70a9b1dbae28502e430c2d3ff3cb773fd9.png)
Ever wonder how flying Lucky Block would be? Well, Balloonies are adding Balloonies (obviously) but what are those?? Balloonies are balloons with face, pop them to see the surprise they brought along!

![Grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d15056e6b02af03a07605a138b2391d918d086d9.png)

# Features

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
1. Balloonies

- Spawns in Plains, Sunflower Plains, Snowy Plains and Meadow.
- Random items or events will occur if they are popped.
- They have total 5 variants and most of them have the same items and events to occur when popped.

2. Ballooning

  Scary balloons that will explode upon touching players.

3. Blue Rose

- A new flower that server nothing but cosmetic.
- Dropped by White Balloonie variant.

4. Quiver

- Randomly picking up 5 arrows (no matter which stack or which types of arrow) in player inventory and shoots.
- Has 20s cooldown and 77 durability.
- Can shoot less than 5 arrows if players have less than 5 in inventory.
- Dropped by White Balloonie variant.

5. Baguette

- Long bread that slash like a sword.
- Has 59 durability and deals 3 damages.
- Same saturation as Bread but raises 4 meat bars.
- Has 10% chance to break into 2 Breads while hitting or mining.

6. Oxidized Blade and Harpoon

- Oxidized Blade has 250 durability with 3 damage.
- Harpoon is throwable like Trident but main use is for pulling enemy to player.
- Harpoon has 232 durability with 5 damage when punching and 4 damage when throwing.
- Both of them can be repaired with Copper Ingot.

7. Tofu, Fermented Tofu and Tofu Block

- Tofu and Fermented Tofu have same saturation and hunger as Sweet Berries.
- Fermented Tofu removes Poison effect.
- Craft Fermented Tofu like Fermented Spider Eye but with Tofu instead of Spider Eye.
- Fermented Tofu can be used to breed Pig.
- Tofu can be crafted into Tofu Block with 9 of it.
- Tofu Block can be used to clutch since it doesn't deal fall damage.
- Can be obtain through killing Balloonies.

</details>

More featurs are coming soon in the next updates. (We are currently working in a new mod so please be patient for about 2 months!

![Grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d15056e6b02af03a07605a138b2391d918d086d9.png)

Psst.. look out for the scary White Balloonie variant!
